title: Alloxylon wickhamii
taxonomy: Alloxylon wickhamii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Proteaceae. It belongs to the genus Alloxylon, which is a group of tropical trees native to the Pacific Islands. The plant is native to the island of New Caledonia. Alloxylon wickhamii is also known as Wickham's wattle or Wickham's stringybark. It is a rare and endangered species due to habitat loss and other environmental factors.
